steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The relationship between distance, speed, and time for constant speed is $$d = vt$$.

steps.title: Compute the time
steps.content: Solve for time: $$t = \frac{d}{v}$$. Substitute $$d = 24\text{ cm}$$ and $$v = 6\text{ cm/s}$$: $$t = \frac{24}{6} = 4\text{ seconds}$$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
